channel.title: Red Team on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Red Team on simeononsecurity

item.title: DagShell Custom Firmware for Orbic RCL400: Complete Installation and Usage Guide 2026
item.category: "Custom Firmware" , "Mobile Security" , "Privacy Tools" , "Network Security" , "Wardriving" , "Penetration Testing" , "IoT Hacking" , "Security Research" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Privacy Technology"
item.description: Comprehensive guide to DagShell custom firmware for Orbic RCL400 hotspot including installation, privacy tools, hacking features, wardriving capabilities, and why it pairs perfectly with RayHunter for mobile security research.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the PT0-003 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Vulnerability Assessment" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Red Team" , "Exploitation" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003) study course covering engagement management, reconnaissance and enumeration, vulnerability discovery, attacks and exploits, and post-exploitation and lateral movement.

item.title: The Essential Guide to Starting a Career in Cybersecurity
item.category: "cybersecurity career" , "starting in cybersecurity" , "build foundation" , "networking fundamentals" , "operating systems" , "coding skills" , "enterprise system administration" , "blue team" , "red team" , "purple team" , "certifications" , "continuous learning" , "first cybersecurity job" , "portfolio building" , "networking for cybersecurity" , "internships in cybersecurity" , "CompTIA Security" , "Certified Ethical Hacker CEH" , "Certified Information Systems Security Professional CISSP" , "cybersecurity conferences" , "cybersecurity trends" , "practical experience" , "cybersecurity projects" , "cybersecurity meetups" , "entry-level cybersecurity" , "defending against cyber threats" , "cybersecurity professionals" , "career development" , "cybersecurity skills" , "cybersecurity education"
item.description: Learn the essential steps to begin a successful career in cybersecurity, from building a strong foundation to exploring different domains and certifications.
